title: Newsletter stat card
description: KPI card for newsletter metrics. `kind` selects the metric label + formatting; `value` is the raw number.

kind.description: Metric key: subscribers / open_rate / click_rate / bounce_rate / complaint_rate.

value.description: Raw number. Rate types formatted as percentages.

children.$expr: ({subscribers: 'Subscribers', open_rate: 'Open rate', click_rate: 'Click rate', bounce_rate: 'Bounce rate', complaint_rate: 'Complaint rate'})[props.kind]

className.$expr: (props.kind === 'bounce_rate' || props.kind === 'complaint_rate') && (props.value ?? 0) > 0.05 ? 'text-2xl font-semibold mt-1 text-danger' : 'text-2xl font-semibold mt-1'
